meaning: n.苏茜(Susan 的昵称,亦作 Susi,Suzie,Susy,Suzy)(f.)
examples: Susie would hand in her composition happily.
Even when a baby, Susie laughed from morning till night.
Susie was always pleasant in her play with other children.
But synod member Susie Leafe said the outcome was because of faults in the legislation.
Ms. Brouwers hired Susie Moore, a senior photographer and family friend, to take Lauren's pictures.
